hero.headline: Before a booking manager risks their name, they need proof.
hero.sub: GIGPROOF turns your live-performance evidence into a verified, method-labelled Bookability Passport — so booking managers can evaluate without guessing.

home.firewall: NO SCORE · NO RANKING · NO PREDICTION · NO GUARANTEE — EVIDENCE, LABELLED BY METHOD

actors.heading: One platform, three different jobs
actors.sub: Booking manager ≠ producer. These are distinct roles with distinct interests — and GIGPROOF keeps them separate at every level.

artist.title: Build your proof profile
artist.body: Collect evidence, invite producers to confirm a single claim, and publish a verified Passport that speaks for you before the first call.

booker.title: Evaluate before you risk your name
booker.body: Read a Bookability Passport in under two minutes. Every claim shows its method and review date — no algorithm, no guessing. Viewing is always free.

producer.title: Confirm one claim, no account needed
producer.body: Receive a bounded magic link, confirm a single claim you know first-hand, and done. Your confirmation is method-labelled on the Passport.

ctaFinal.heading: Ready to build your proof profile?
ctaFinal.sub: Closed beta — Israeli artists only. Early access is limited.

passport.demoBanner: SAMPLE PASSPORT — FICTIONAL ARTIST FOR ILLUSTRATION ONLY
passport.footer: NO SCORE · NO RANKING · NO PREDICTION · NO GUARANTEE.
passport.bandNote: FIGURES SHOWN AS BAND — NO EXACT NUMBER

methodology.firewallPrinciple: GIGPROOF publishes no score, ranking, percentile, prediction, or guarantee.

ticketExport.label: TICKET EXPORT
ticketExport.desc: Exported ticket sales data from the ticketing platform operator.

producerConfirmed.label: PRODUCER-CONFIRMED
producerConfirmed.desc: A producer with first-hand knowledge confirmed this claim via a bounded magic link.

platformData.label: PLATFORM DATA
platformData.desc: Public data sourced directly from the platform (contextual, not draw evidence).

operatorReviewed.label: OPERATOR-REVIEWED
operatorReviewed.desc: GIGPROOF reviewed documentation and approved this claim.

selfReported.label: SELF-REPORTED
selfReported.desc: Provided by the artist without external verification.
